--- Main Page ---
IBERVILLE CUISINE
Search this site
Embedded Files
Skip to main content
Skip to navigation
Best New Orleans Restaurant in the French Quarter
Mediterranean & Creole Cuisine, Rooted in New Orleans
RESERVATIONS
REVIEWS
Excellent Shrimp and Grits. Great atmosphere and staff. I am not drinker of alcohol and the bartender made me a delicious mocktail. Boudin Balls were delicious and the live entertainment was amazing.
Angelia J.
This place is amazing!!! I dined here with friends for my birthday and this place did not disappoint. It has old New Orleans charm. It is elegant, beautiful and welcoming. Sergio the server and the bartender Tanish definitely added to the experience. All together we ordered the boudin balls, spinach dip, crab cakes, BBQ shrimp, fish poboy with fries, shrimp and grits and chicken and andouille sausage gumbo. Everything was amazing. I will definitely be back!
Brice, M
This place is very nice, clean and very friendly. Staff and I got to meet the owner. I would highly recommend.
Tim V
The restaurant decor was very beautiful . The service from our waiter couldn’t be better. Now let’s talk about the food now can I say again food!!! Taste the favor a party in your mouth of goodness. A must stop when you’re in New Orleans completely satisfied! and don’t forget about the dessert chef kiss💋👌🏿
JOHN

--- Page: /private-events ---
IBERVILLE CUISINE - Private Events
Search this site
Embedded Files
Skip to main content
Skip to navigation
French Quarter -
Private Events &
Group Dining
Celebrate at Iberville Cuisine
Host your next celebration in the heart of the French Quarter at
Iberville Cuisine
, New Orleans’ destination for private dining, group events, and unforgettable gatherings. Our venue blends modern Cajun flavors with true New Orleans hospitality—perfect for birthdays, corporate dinners, rehearsal dinners, holiday parties, and social events of any size.
Located just steps from Bourbon Street and Canal Street, Iberville Cuisine offers convenience, premium service, and a unique French Quarter atmosphere your guests will love.
Private Event Options
We offer flexible event spaces to accommodate everything from intimate dinners to large group celebrations. Our optional
private room for up to 30 guests
is ideal for VIP groups, corporate functions, and private parties seeking exclusivity and elevated service.
Why Host Your Event at Iberville Cuisine?
Prime French Quarter location
Customizable menus featuring modern Cajun cuisine
Full bar with craft cocktails & group beverage packages
Dedicated event coordination
Optional private room for up to 30 guests
Ideal for birthdays, corporate events, holiday parties, rehearsal dinners, and convention groups
Close to major hotels, Bourbon St., Canal St., and the convention center
Group Menus & Catering Options
Our chef-created group menus make planning easy. Choose from plated dinners, buffet-style setups, or custom menus tailored to your event theme. We can also accommodate dietary needs, special requests, and add-on experiences such as cocktails, desserts, or themed décor.
Perfect for Convention & Corporate Groups
Traveling with a team or attending an event in New Orleans? Iberville Cuisine is within walking distance of major hotels, the convention center, and popular attractions—making it the perfect spot for networking dinners, client meetings, and large group dining.
Book Your Event Today
To begin planning your private event at Iberville Cuisine, contact our events team with your date, group size, and any special requests. We respond quickly and work with you to create a seamless, memorable experience for your guests.

--- Page: /about ---
IBERVILLE CUISINE - About
Search this site
Embedded Files
Skip to main content
Skip to navigation
Our Story
About Iberville Cuisine
Located in the heart of the French Quarter in New Orleans
, Iberville Cuisine is a locally owned and operated restaurant serving elevated Southern and Creole dishes with a modern twist. Just steps from Bourbon Street, our vibrant space blends classic New Orleans charm with exceptional hospitality and unforgettable flavors.
At Iberville Cuisine, we’re passionate about
fresh Gulf seafood, handcrafted cocktails, and authentic New Orleans comfort food
. Our menu is designed to celebrate Louisiana’s rich culinary heritage—think crispy fried shrimp platters, house-made gumbo, buttery lump crab cakes, and signature dishes inspired by local traditions.
Whether you're visiting the French Quarter for the first time or you're a lifelong local, Iberville Cuisine is a must-visit destination for
Dinner.
Our inviting atmosphere, friendly service, and flavorful menu make us a favorite among food lovers, locals, and tourists alike.
We take pride in sourcing local ingredients, supporting regional vendors, and creating a dining experience that reflects the soul of New Orleans. From
live music nights
to seasonal specials, there’s always something new happening at Iberville Cuisine.
Come taste why we’re one of the best restaurants in New Orleans. Whether you're craving
Southern classics, seafood favorites, or Creole comfort food
, you'll find something to love at Iberville Cuisine.
Meet the Chef - Nathan Morris
Chef Nathan Morris leads the kitchen at Iberville Cuisine with a passion for bold flavors, Southern comfort, and the soulful traditions of New Orleans cooking. Trained by the Gordon Ramsay culinary team, Chef Nathan brings refined technique and fresh creativity to every dish he crafts.
With a family that has lived in Louisiana for generations — some of the early settlers in the region — Louisiana cooking has always been a part of him. The flavors, stories, and traditions of his roots inspire his approach to every plate, blending heritage with modern culinary artistry.
His philosophy is simple:
quality ingredients, authentic flavor, and unforgettable hospitality.
From Cajun pastas to signature seafood plates, his dishes feel both familiar and exciting, creating a dining experience that resonates with locals and visitors alike.
At Iberville Cuisine, Chef Nathan’s deep Louisiana heritage, expert training, and culinary vision come together to celebrate real New Orleans food, crafted with heart and world-class technique.
